name: Scarlet Descent Road
feel: Traffic becomes procedural the closer one gets to the descent gate: charters, washdowns, gear checks, and return accounting take precedence over speed.
paperwork_and_permission_model: Travel along Scarlet Descent Road is easiest when intentions, cargo, and patronage are legible before questions begin.
patrol_rhythm: Daylight oversight is visible and procedural; night oversight is thinner, more suspicious, and less forgiving.
after_dark_change: After sunset, traffic thins, trust narrows, and informal power brokers matter more than posted rules.
